channel.title: FollowGrubby on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in FollowGrubby on RaihnForge

item.title: Grubby vs Flash MLG Dallas Cheerful
item.description:
[HD 1280x720] [HD + 1920x1050]

I found out that Grubby will be squaring off vs  Flash in the first casted match of  MLG Dallas – Summer Championship happening tomorrow! The Warcraft 3 legend and Starcraft 2 titan squaring off inspired me to sketch up a little cheerful for them. I’m cheering for Grubby, of course but I wish the best of luck to both players. Somewhat selfishly I hope that it will be one of the most devastating spectacles of Terran mechanized battle bombardment thundering against the devote zen psi-shielding of the focused Protoss as they lighten the field with their searing storms.

item.title: Grubby Splash Protoss Video Player
item.description:
A web page splash page for a the work in progress FollowGrubby.com.

I originally took in game screen-shots to construct an image that would serve as backdrop for Grubby’s announcement to his fans.  Wanting to add more personality, I decided to illustrate my own Protoss UI over the top of the draft, and it came out much better than I had anticipated.

In the end, I actually also created the .html css file for the live splash page.  It took a little bit of learning on top of what I already know, but after about 30 minutes I had the file that would go live. I was quite proud of myself.
